arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are aiming to avoid an all-timer of an FA Cup upset when they face National League opposition in Tamworth on Sunday afternoon. Tottenham predicted lineup vs Tamworth (4-3-3) : Kinsky; Spence, Dragusin, Dorrington, Reguilon; Bissouma, Maddison, Sarr; Yang, Lankshear, Moore.

arts.ttl: Meet the Tamworth part-timers looking to shock Tottenham's £667MILLION squad in the FA Cup third round
arts.sum: As Tamworth prepare to take on Premier League giants Tottenham Hotspur in the FA Cup third round, the gulf in footballing lifestyles couldn't be more pronounced.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Tamworth – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to Tamworth in a classic FA Cup third-round tie this weekend. Ange Postecoglou’s side travel to the 4,963-capacity Lamb Ground to take on the non-league side, who are seeking a historic giant-killing in a competition made famous by upsets. arts.ttl: Tamworth vs Tottenham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Non-league Tamworth take on Tottenham in search of a giant-killing in the FA Cup’s third round draw this weekend. It is the biggest gap between two teams in the third round, with 96 places currently separating the sides in the football pyramid.
